signals.headline: Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Targets 150ms Transaction Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Targets 150ms Transaction Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**

The **Alpenglow upgrade** has been confirmed and aims to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to just **150 milliseconds** in 2026[1]. This significant technical advancement addresses one of Solana's key performance bottlenecks and represents a major catalyst for institutional adoption.

signals.headline: Based on the search results provided, here are the relevant breaking developments:
signals.raw: Based on the search results provided, here are the relevant breaking developments:

signals.headline: Institutional ETF Holdings at Record Levels | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Institutional ETF Holdings at Record Levels | YES | HIGH confidence**

Major financial institutions including **BlackRock and Fidelity have disclosed record SOL ETF holdings** despite recent market consolidation[1], signaling sustained institutional interest despite the broader bearish price action.

signals.headline: Price Context:**
signals.raw:
Price Context:**

While SOL **surged 10%** recently[1], the token entered April under pressure following a six-month downtrend, trading around $80-$83 in late March[4][5]. The technical picture shows dense resistance at the 20-day EMA ($86) and 50-day EMA ($90)[4].

signals.headline: Germany January 2025 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
Germany January 2025 Inflation at 2.1% (Historical, Above 2% Target) | NO | LOW confidence**  
German headline inflation rose to 2.1% YoY in January 2025 from 1.8%, with core at 2.5%, driven by energy and food; no 2026 data or resolutions noted.[2] This predates current date and unlikely to move markets now, as projections see ~2% fluctuations.[2]

signals.headline: Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders & Record Transaction Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders & Record Transaction Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**

As of April 14, 2026, Solana achieved an **all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders** with daily non-vote transactions reaching historic highs of **148 million transactions**[1]. This represents a major network milestone that could move prediction markets.

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2%, Below Forecasts Amid Oil Volatility | YES | MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% and staying near the Bank of Korea's 2% target despite global energy disruptions from the Iran conflict.[1] This could shift prediction markets on Asia-Pacifi
